name: Lafayette
description_short: Fast-casual slider restaurant chain opening its first Lafayette location on Old U.S. 231. Not a financial services company.
description_long: Savvy Sliders is a fast-casual restaurant concept specializing in slider sandwiches, not a financial services provider. The company is owned and operated by Mike Bauer, a Lafayette-based business entrepreneur who has built a successful track record managing 22 Subway franchise locations across Lafayette and Terre Haute, Indiana. Bauer is expanding his portfolio by bringing Savvy Sliders to the Lafayette market at 2862 Old U.S. 231 South, positioning it as a new dining option for customers on that corridor. The restaurant opened its doors on Tuesday (February 27, 2026) and operates daily from 10 a.m. to 10 p.m. Savvy Sliders is a food service establishment, not a lender, credit counselor, or alternative financial services provider. The source material contains no information about financial products, lending terms, fees, or any consumer finance offerings. This company was incorrectly categorized in the database as a payday-alternative lender when it is actually a quick-service restaurant. There is no basis in the provided content to classify this as a financial services company of any kind.
pros: Operated by experienced franchise owner with 22 existing Subway locations in the region
Extended daily operating hours (10 a.m. to 10 p.m.) provide convenient access
New fast-food option on underserved Old U.S. 231 corridor
Grand opening giveaways and promotions announced
Established business owner with track record of multi-unit management
cons: This is a restaurant, not a financial services company—major categorization error
No financial products, lending services, or consumer finance offerings available
Website content provides no information about menu, pricing, or food quality
best_for: Customers seeking fast-casual slider sandwiches in Lafayette
People working or traveling on Old U.S. 231 corridor looking for lunch/dinner options
diagnosis: Savvy Sliders is a fast-food restaurant, not a financial services provider. This company has been miscategorized and should be removed from CreditDoc's financial services database entirely.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
